# 数学

## Meiseel Lehmer算法(版本一)

```cpp
struct Meissel_Lehmer{
    //通过知道前面的 n^1/3 的质数可以推断后面n^2/3的质数所以可以适当减小
    static const int M=7;
    static const int PM=2*3*5*7*11*13*17;
    static const int N=5e6+5;
    vector<bool> np;//是否是素数
    vector<T> prime,pi;// 质数容器，质数个数
    vector<vector<T>> phi;
    vector<T> sz;
    int n;
    Meissel_Lehmer(){
        init();
    }
    void sieve(){
        int c=0;
        np[0]=np[1]=1;
        pi[0]=pi[1]=0;
        for(int i=2;i<N;i++){
            if(!np[i])prime[++c]=i;
            pi[i]=c;
            for(int j=1;j<=c&&prime[j]*i<N;j++){
                np[prime[j]*i]=1;
                if(i%prime[j]==0)break;
            }
        }
    }
    void init(){
        np.resize(N,0);
        pi.resize(N,0);
        prime.resize(N,0);
        phi.resize(PM+1,vector<T>(M+1,0));
        sz.resize(M+1,0);
        sieve();
        sz[0]=1;
        for(int i=0;i<=PM;i++)phi[i][0]=i;
        for(int i=1;i<=M;i++){
            sz[i]=prime[i]*sz[i-1];
            for(int j=1;j<=PM;j++)phi[j][i]=phi[j][i-1]-phi[j/prime[i]][i-1];
        }
    }
    int Sqrt(T x){
        int r=sqrtl(x-0.1);
        while(r*r<=x)r++;
        return r-1;
    }
    int Cbrt(T x){
        int r=cbrtl(x-0.1);
        while(r*r*r<=x)r++;
        return r-1;
    }
    T get_phi(T x,int s){
        if(s==0)return x;
        if(s<=M)return phi[x%sz[s]][s]+(x/sz[s])*phi[sz[s]][s];
        if(x<=prime[s]*prime[s])return pi[x]-s+1;
        if(x<=prime[s]*prime[s]*prime[s]&&x<N){
            T tmp=pi[Sqrt(x)];
            T ans=pi[x]-(tmp+s-2)*(tmp-s+1)/2;
            for(int i=s+1;i<=tmp;i++)ans+=pi[x/prime[i]];
            return ans;
        }
        return get_phi(x,s-1)-get_phi(x/prime[s],s-1);
    }
    T get_pi(int x){
        if(x<N)return pi[x];
        T ans=get_phi(x,pi[Cbrt(x)])+pi[Cbrt(x)]-1;
        for(int i=pi[Cbrt(x)]+1,ed=pi[Sqrt(x)];i<=ed;i++)ans-=get_pi(x/prime[i])-i+1;
        return ans;
    }
    T lehmer(T x){
        if(x<N)return pi[x];
        T a=lehmer(Sqrt(Sqrt(x)));
        T b=lehmer(Sqrt(x));
        T c=lehmer(Cbrt(x));
        T ans=get_phi(x,a)+(b+a-2)*(b-a+1)/2;
        for(int i=a+1;i<=b;i++){
            T w=x/prime[i];
            ans-=lehmer(w);
            if(i>c)continue;
            T lim=lehmer(Sqrt(w));
            for(int j=i;j<=lim;j++)ans-=lehmer(w/prime[j])-j+1;
        }
        return ans;
    }
};
```

## Meiseel Lehmer算法(版本二)

复杂度$O(\frac{n^{\frac{2}{3}}}{\log^2 n})$

```cpp
struct MeisselLehmer {
    T N;
    T v, n4, TT, K, B; // v=n^{1/2}, n4=n^{1/4}, T=小质数上限, K=大质数上限, B=N/K
    vector<T> l;      // l[i] = 剩余数估计: ⌊N/i⌋-1 筛去小质数后的剩余数
    vector<int> s;      // Fenwick Tree 底层: 已筛掉的数数量
    vector<bool> e;     // 标记数组: e[i]=true 表示 i 被筛为合数
    vector<int> w;      // e 的前缀和, 亦可当作 Fenwick Tree 数据
    vector<int> roughs; // 存放未被筛除的 candidates (<= B)

    // 返回 π(N)
    T count(T N){
        if(N<=1)return 0;
        this->N=N;
        v=sqrt(N+0.5);
        n4=sqrt(v+0.5);
        TT=min((int)sqrt(n4)*2,n4);
        K=pow(N,0.625)/log(N);
        K=max(K,v);
        K=min<T>(K,N);
        B=N/K;
        B=N/(N/B);
        B=min<T>(N/(N/B),K);
        l.assign(v+1,0);
        s.assign(K+1,0);
        e.assign(K+1,0);
        w.assign(K+1,0);
        for(int i=1;i<=v;i++)l[i]=N/i-1;
        for(int i=1;i<=v;i++)s[i]=i-1;
        const auto div=[](T n,int d){return (T)(1.0*n/d);};
        int p;
        for(p=2;p<=TT;p++){
            if(s[p]!=s[p-1]){
                T M=N/p;
                int t=v/p,t0=s[p-1];
                for(int i=1;i<=t;i++)l[i]-=l[i*p]-t0;
                for(int i=t+1;i<=v;i++)l[i]-=s[div(M,i)]-t0;
                for(int i=v,j=t;j>=p;j--){
                    for(int l=j*p;i>=l;i--)s[i]-=s[j]-t0;
                }
                for(int i=p*p;i<=K;i+=p)e[i]=1;
            }
        }
        
        e[1]=1;
        int cnt=1;
        roughs.assign(B+1,0);
        for(int i=1;i<=B;i++){
            if(!e[i])roughs[cnt++]=i;
        }
        roughs[cnt]=INT_MAX;
        for(int i=1;i<=K;i++)w[i]=w[i-1]+e[i];
        for(int i=1;i<=K;i++)s[i]=w[i]-w[i-(i&-i)];
        const auto query=[&](int x){
            int ans=x;
            for(int i=x;i;i&=i-1)ans-=s[i];
            return ans;
        };
        const auto add=[&](int x){
            e[x]=1;
            for(int i=x;i<=K;i+=i&-i)s[i]++;
        };
        cnt=1;
        for(;p<=n4;p++){
            if(!e[p]){
                T q=1ll*p*p,M=N/p;
                while(cnt<q)w[cnt++]=query(cnt);
                int t1=B/p,t2=min<T>(B,M/q),t0=query(p-1);
                int id=1,i=1;
                for(;i<=t1;i=roughs[++id])l[i]-=l[i*p]-t0;
                for(;i<=t2;i=roughs[++id])l[i]-=query(div(M,i))-t0;
                for(;i<=B;i=roughs[++id])l[i]-=w[div(M,i)]-t0;
                for(int i=q;i<=K;i+=p){
                    if(!e[i])add(i);
                }
            }
        }
        while(cnt<=v)w[cnt++]=query(cnt);
        vector<int> prime;
        prime.push_back(1);
        for(int i=2;i<=v;i++){
            if(!e[i])prime.push_back(i);
        }
        l[1]+=1ll*(w[v]+w[n4]-1)*(w[v]-w[n4])/2;
        for(int i=w[n4]+1;i<=w[B];i++)l[1]-=l[prime[i]];
        for(int i=w[B]+1;i<=w[v];i++)l[1]-=query(N/prime[i]);
        for(int i=w[n4]+1;i<=w[v];i++){
            T q=prime[i],M=N/q;
            int e=w[M/q];
            if(e<=i)break;
            l[1]+=e-i;
            T t=0;
            int m=w[(int)sqrt(M+0.5)];
            for(int k=i+1;k<=m;k++)t+=w[div(M,prime[k])];
            l[1]+=2*t-1ll*(i+m)*(m-i);
        }
        return l[1];
    }
};
```

## 二次剩余

给出$N,p$，求解$x^2 \equiv N(\mod p)$的两个解

```cpp
int cipolla(int x,int P){
    x%=P;
    if(!x)return 0;
    if(qpow(x,P-1>>1,P)==P-1)return -1;
    while(1){
        int a=rng()%P;
        int w=(a*a%P-x+P)%P;
        const auto mul=[&](PII a,PII b){
            return PII{(a.F*b.F%P+w*a.S%P*b.S%P)%P,(a.F*b.S%P+a.S*b.F%P)%P};
        };
        const auto pow=[&](PII a,int b){
            PII res{1,0};
            for(;b;b>>=1){
                if(b&1)res=mul(res,a);
                a=mul(a,a);
            }
            return res.F;
        };
        if(qpow(w,P-1>>1,P)==P-1){
            int res=pow(PII{a,1},P+1>>1);
            return min(res,P-res);
        }
    }
}
void solve(){
    int n,p;
    cin>>n>>p;
    int res=cipolla(n,p);
    if(res==-1)cout<<"Hola!\n";
    else{
        int ans=(p-res)%p;
        if(ans>res)swap(ans,res);
        if(ans==res)cout<<ans<<"\n";
        else cout<<ans<<" "<<res<<"\n";
    }
}
```

## 裴蜀定理

$ax+by=n$有解当且仅当$\gcd(a,b)|n$

可以拓展到多个整数

$exgcd(a,b,x,y)$求出特殊解，$dx=\frac{b}{g},dy=\frac{a}{g}$

有通解如下：
$$
\begin{cases}
x=x+t\cdot dx \\
y=y-t \cdot dy
\end{cases}
$$
进一步结论：

$ax+by=n,a,b$互素，记$C=ab-a-b$(必定为奇数)

则对任意的整数$n \in[0,C]$,$n$和$C-n$只有一个能被表示

例子：$a,b$两种不同的面值，不能表示的最大钱数为$C$

几何意义：

这条直线与第一象限相交组成三角形$(0,0),(0,a),(b,0)$，$n$小于$ab$时直线只会有一个整数点，随着向右上方移动，直至有至少两个整数点

当$n \lt ab$时，小于等于$n$的能被表示的非负整数数量为$\sum_{i=0}^{\frac{n}{a}}\frac{n-ia}{b}$，可以用类欧几里得求解

## 快速幂模指数

$x^n \equiv x^{n \mod \phi(m)} \mod m$

## 类欧几里得推导

求$f(a,b,c,n)=\sum_{i=0}^{n-1}\lfloor \frac{ai+b}{c} \rfloor$

若$a \geq c$或者$b \geq c$,令$a'=a \mod c,b'=b \mod c$
$$
f(a,b,c,n)=\sum_{i=0}^{n-1} \lfloor \frac{a}{c} \rfloor i+\lfloor \frac{b}{c} \rfloor+\lfloor \frac{a'i+b'}{c} \rfloor=\frac{n(n-1)}{2}\lfloor \frac{a}{c} \rfloor+n\lfloor \frac{b}{c} \rfloor+f(a',b',c,n)
$$
就转化成了$a \lt c,b \lt c$的情况

考虑$a \lt c,b \lt c$的情况：
$$
f(a,b,c,n)=\sum_{i=0}^{n-1}\sum_{j=0}^{\lfloor\frac{ai+b}{c}\rfloor-1}[1]
$$
令$m=\lfloor\frac{a(n-1)+b}{c} \rfloor-1$
$$
f(a,b,c,n)=\sum_{j=0}^m\sum_{i=0}^{n-1}[j \lt \lfloor \frac{ai+b}{c} \rfloor]\\
=\sum_{j=0}^{m-1}\sum_{i=0}^{n-1}[c(j+1) \leq ai+b]\\
=\sum_{j=0}^{m-1}\sum_{i=0}^{n-1}[i \gt \lfloor \frac{cj+c-b-1}{a}\rfloor]\\
=\sum_{j=0}^{m-1}[n-1-\lfloor \frac{cj+c-b-1}{a}\rfloor]\\
=(n-1)m-f(c,c-b-1,a,m)
$$
复杂度$O(\log \max(a,c))$

从几何意义讲，表示的是$y=\frac{ax+b}{c}$下的整数点



类似地，$g(a,b,c,n)=\sum_{i=0}^{n-1}i\lfloor \frac{ai+b}{c} \rfloor,h(a,b,c,n)=\sum_{i=0}^{n-1}\lfloor \frac{ai+b}{c} \rfloor^2$



$a \geq c,b \geq c$的情况:

$g(a,b,c,n)=\frac{n(n-1)(2n-1)}{6}\lfloor \frac{a}{c} \rfloor+\frac{n(n-1)}{2}\lfloor\frac{b}{c}\rfloor+g(a',b',c,n)$

$h(a,b,c,n)=h(a',b',c,n)+2\lfloor \frac{a}{c} \rfloor g(a',b',c,n)+2\lfloor\frac{b}{c}\rfloor f(a',b',c,n)+\frac{n(n-1)(2n-1)}{6}\lfloor \frac{a}{c} \rfloor^2+n(n-1)\lfloor \frac{a}{c} \rfloor \lfloor \frac{b}{c} \rfloor+n\lfloor\frac{b}{c}\rfloor^2$

$a \lt c,b \lt c$的情况：

$g(a,b,c,n)=\frac{1}{2}(mn(n-1)-h(c,c-b-1,a,m)-f(c,c-b-1,a,m))$

$h(a,b,c,n)=(n-1)m^2-2g(c,c-b-1,a,m)-f(c,c-b-1,a,m)$

```cpp
struct FloorSum{
    static constexpr int MOD=998244353,inv2=499122177,inv6=166374059;
    struct Node{
        int f=0,g=0,h=0;
    };
    int mo(int x){return x>=MOD?x-MOD:x;}
    int sqr(int x){return 1ll*x*x%MOD;}
    Node f(int a,int b,int c,int n){
        Node res;
        if(!a){
            res.f=1ll*b/c*n%MOD;
            res.g=1ll*n*(n-1)/2%MOD*(b/c)%MOD;
            res.h=1ll*sqr(b/c)*n%MOD;
        }
        else if(a>=c||b>=c){
            Node o=f(a%c,b%c,c,n);
            res.f=(o.f+1ll*n*(n-1)/2%MOD*(a/c)+1ll*b/c*n)%MOD;
            res.g=(o.g+1ll*a/c*n%MOD*(n-1)%MOD*(n*2-1)%MOD*inv6+1ll*n*(n-1)/2%MOD*(b/c))%MOD;
            res.h=(o.h+2ll*(a/c)*o.g+2ll*(b/c)*o.f+1ll*n*(n-1)%MOD*(n*2-1)%MOD*inv6%MOD*sqr(a/c)+1ll*n*(n-1)%MOD*(a/c)%MOD*(b/c)+1ll*n*sqr(b/c))%MOD;
        }
        else{
            int m=(1ll*a*(n-1)+b)/c;
            Node o=f(c,c-b-1,a,m);
            res.f=(1ll*(n-1)*m-o.f+MOD)%MOD;
            res.g=((1ll*m*n%MOD*(n-1)-o.h-o.f)%MOD+MOD)*inv2%MOD;
            res.h=(1ll*(n-1)*m%MOD*m-mo(o.g*2)-o.f+MOD+MOD)%MOD;
        }
        return res;
    }
};
void solve(){
    FloorSum f;
    int a,b,c,n;
    cin>>n>>a>>b>>c;
    auto res=f.f(a,b,c,n+1);
    cout<<res.f<<" "<<res.h<<" "<<res.g<<"\n";
}
```





## 万能欧几里得

记如果经过网格的一条横线，$y=c(c是大于等于0的任意正整数)$，就乘上矩阵$U$，如果经过$x=c(c是大于等于0的任意正整数)$，乘上矩阵$R$,如果同时经过则先$U$再$R$

例子：$y=\lfloor \frac{ai+b}{c} \rfloor$,我们维护向量$[y,\sum y,1]$

则经过$U$时，$y+1$，经过$R$，$\sum y+y$
$$
U=\begin{pmatrix}
1 & 0 & 0\\
0 & 1 & 0\\
1 & 0 & 1
\end{pmatrix},
R=\begin{pmatrix}
1 & 1 & 0\\
0 & 1 & 0\\
0 & 0 & 1
\end{pmatrix}
$$
模板如下，复杂度为$O(T \log \max(a,c))$

```cpp
template<typename T>
struct FloorSum{
    T qpow(T a,int b){
        T res;
        while(b){
            if(b&1)res=res*a;
            a=a*a;
            b>>=1;
        }
        return res;
    }
    T f(int a,int b,int c,int n,T U,T R){
        if(!n)return T();
        if(b>=c)return qpow(U,b/c)*f(a,b%c,c,n,U,R);
        if(a>=c)return f(a%c,b,c,n,U,qpow(U,a/c)*R);
        int m=((__int128)a*n+b)/c;
        if(!m)return qpow(R,n);
        return qpow(R,(c-b-1)/a)*U*f(c,(c-b-1)%a,a,m-1,R,U)*qpow(R,n-((__int128)c*m-b-1)/a);
    }
};
```

考虑模板题，要求的是$\sum y,\sum y^2 ,\sum xy$，如何合并两个区间

定义$X_{l/r},Y_{l/r}$表示左/右区间的$cntr,cntu$的值(经过多少个$R，U$)
$$
\sum y=\sum y_l+\sum (y_r+Y_l)=\sum y_l+\sum y_r+X_rY_l\\
\sum y^2=\sum y_l^2+\sum(y_r+Y_l)^2=\sum y_l^2+\sum y_r^2+2Y_l\sum y_r+X_rY_l^2\\
\sum xy=\sum x_ly_l+\sum (x_r+X_l)(y_r+Y_l)=\sum x_ly_l+\sum x_ry_r+Y_l\sum x_r+X_l\sum y_r+X_rX_lY_l\\
\sum x=\sum x_l+\sum (x_r+X_l)=\sum x_l+\sum x_r+X_lX_r
$$
总结：

* 左边求和的数量为$X_l$，右边求和的数量为$X_r$
* 合并时，右边的$x,y$加上$X_l,Y_l$
* $U,R$初始化时，$U$初始化$y$，$R$初始化$x$以及其他和$x$相关的答案

写出如下结构体

```cpp
struct Info{
    int x,y,sumx,sumy,sumxy,sumy2;
    Info():x(0),y(0),sumx(0),sumy(0),sumxy(0),sumy2(0){}
    Info operator * (const Info &r){
        Info res;
        res.x=(x+r.x)%mod;
        res.y=(y+r.y)%mod;
        res.sumx=(sumx+r.sumx+x*r.x%mod)%mod;
        res.sumy=(sumy+r.sumy+y*r.x%mod)%mod;
        res.sumy2=(sumy2+r.sumy2+2*y%mod*r.sumy%mod+r.x*y%mod*y%mod)%mod;
        res.sumxy=(sumxy+r.sumxy+y*r.sumx%mod+x*r.sumy%mod+x*y%mod*r.x%mod)%mod;
        return res;
    }
};
```

初始化$U,R$，求解的是$[1,n]$的范围，需要加上$i=0$的答案

```cpp
void solve(){
    int n,a,b,c;
    cin>>n>>a>>b>>c;
    Info U,R;
    U.y=R.x=R.sumx=1;
    FloorSum<Info> f;
    auto ans=f.f(a,b,c,n,U,R);
    ans.sumy=(ans.sumy+b/c)%mod;
    ans.sumy2=(ans.sumy2+(b/c)*(b/c))%mod;
    cout<<ans.sumy<<" "<<ans.sumy2<<" "<<ans.sumxy<<"\n";
}
```

### 求$\sum_{i=1}^{n}A^iB^{\lfloor \frac{ai+b}{c} \rfloor}$

维护$\sum A^xB^y,A^X,B^Y$
$$
\sum A^xB^y=\sum A^{x_l}B^{y_l}+\sum A^{X_l+x_r}B^{Y_l+y_r}=\sum A^{x_l}B^{y_l}+A^{X_l}\sum A^{x_r}B^{y_r}B^{Y_l}
$$

```cpp
struct Matrix{
    static constexpr int maxn=22;
    int m[maxn][maxn];
    Matrix(){
        memset(m,0,sizeof m);
    }
    Matrix(int n){
        init(n);
    }
    void init(int n){
        memset(m,0,sizeof m);
        for(int i=0;i<n;i++)m[i][i]=1;
    }
    Matrix operator*(const Matrix &a){
        Matrix res;
        for(int k=0;k<maxn;k++){
            for(int i=0;i<maxn;i++){
                for(int j=0;j<maxn;j++){
                    res.m[i][j]=(res.m[i][j]+m[i][k]*a.m[k][j]%mod)%mod;
                }
            }
        }
        return res;
    }
    Matrix operator+(const Matrix &a){
        Matrix res;
        for(int i=0;i<maxn;i++){
            for(int j=0;j<maxn;j++){
                res.m[i][j]=(m[i][j]+a.m[i][j])%mod;
            }
        }
        return res;
    }
};
struct Info{
    Matrix sum,x,y;
    Info():sum(),x(22),y(22){}
    Info operator * (const Info &r){
        Info res;
        res.x=x*r.x;
        res.y=y*r.y;
        res.sum=sum+x*r.sum*y;
        return res;
    }
};
template<typename T>
struct FloorSum{
    T qpow(T a,int b){
        T res;
        while(b){
            if(b&1)res=res*a;
            a=a*a;
            b>>=1;
        }
        return res;
    }
    T f(int a,int b,int c,int n,T U,T R){
        if(!n)return T();
        if(b>=c)return qpow(U,b/c)*f(a,b%c,c,n,U,R);
        if(a>=c)return f(a%c,b,c,n,U,qpow(U,a/c)*R);
        int m=((__int128)a*n+b)/c;
        if(!m)return qpow(R,n);
        return qpow(R,(c-b-1)/a)*U*f(c,(c-b-1)%a,a,m-1,R,U)*qpow(R,n-((__int128)c*m-b-1)/a);
    }
};
void solve(){
    int p,q,r,l,n;
    cin>>p>>q>>r>>l>>n;
    Info R,U;
    for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
        for(int j=0;j<n;j++)cin>>R.x.m[i][j],R.sum.m[i][j]=R.x.m[i][j];
    }
    for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
        for(int j=0;j<n;j++)cin>>U.y.m[i][j];
    }
    FloorSum<Info> f;
    auto ans=f.f(p,r,q,l,U,R);
    for(int i=0;i<n;i++){
        for(int j=0;j<n;j++)cout<<ans.sum.m[i][j]<<" \n"[j==n-1];
    }
}
```

### 求$\sum_{i=0}^n \lfloor\frac{ai+b}{c}\rfloor$(简单版)

```cpp
int FloorSum(int a,int b,int c,int n){// \sum_{i=0}^{n} (ai+b)/c
	if(!a)return b/c*(n+1);
	if(a<0){
		b+=n*a;
		a=-a;
	}
	if(b<0){
		int d=(a-b-1)/a;
		n-=d;
		b+=a*d;
        if(n<0)return 0;
    }
    //======== 负数计入答案 ======================
    // if(b<0){
    //     int k=(c-b-1)/c;
    //     return FloorSum(a,b+k*c,c,n)-k*(n+1);
	// }
    //===========================================
	if(a>=c||b>=c)return n*(n+1)/2*(a/c)+(b/c)*(n+1)+FloorSum(a%c,b%c,c,n);
	int m=(a*n+b)/c;
	return m*n-FloorSum(c,c-b-1,a,m-1);
}
```

### 求1~n除M模R的数的二进制1的数量

结论：对于一个数$A$二进制第$k$位为$1$，有$\lfloor \frac{A+2^k}{2^{k+1}}\rfloor-\lfloor \frac{A}{2^{k+1}} \rfloor=1$，另一种写法是$\lfloor \frac{A}{2^k} \rfloor-2\lfloor \frac{A}{2^{k+1}} \rfloor=1$

可以用类欧求解

### 求$\sum_{x=0}^n x^{k_1}\lfloor \frac{ax+b}{c} \rfloor^{k_2}$

$$
\sum x^{k_1}y^{k_2}=\sum x_l^{k_1}y_l^{k_2}+\sum(x_r+X_l)^{k_1}(y_r+Y_l)^{k_2}\\
\sum(x_r+X_l)^{k_1}(y_r+Y_l)^{k_2}=\sum \sum_{i=0}^{k_1}\sum_{j=0}^{k_2}\binom{k_1}{i}X_l^ix_r^{k_1-i}\binom{k_2}{j}Y_l^jy_r^{k_2-j}=\sum_{i=0}^{k_1}\sum_{j=0}^{k_2}\binom{k_1}{i}\binom{k_2}{j}X_l^iY_l^j \sum x_r^{k_1-i}y_r^{k_2-j}
$$

因此启发我们维护$x,y,\sum x^iy^j$

```cpp
struct Info{
    int x,y;
    vector<vector<int>> sum;
    Info():sum(vector (k1+1,vector<int>(k2+1))),x(0),y(0){}
    Info operator * (const Info &r){
        Info res;
        res.x=(x+r.x)%mod;
        res.y=(y+r.y)%mod;
        int cx=x%mod,cy=y%mod;
        for(int u=0;u<=k1;u++){
            for(int v=0;v<=k2;v++){
                res.sum[u][v]=sum[u][v];
                for(int i=0,X=1;i<=u;i++,X=X*cx%mod){
                    for(int j=0,Y=1;j<=v;j++,Y=Y*cy%mod){
                        res.sum[u][v]=(res.sum[u][v]+comb.binom(u,i)*comb.binom(v,j)%mod*X%mod*Y%mod*r.sum[u-i][v-j]%mod)%mod;
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        return res;
    }
};
void solve(){
    int n,a,b,c;
    cin>>n>>a>>b>>c>>k1>>k2;
    FloorSum<Info> f;
    Info U,R;
    U.y=R.x=1;
    for(int i=0;i<=k1;i++)R.sum[i][0]=1;
    comb.init(15);
    auto ans=f.f(a,b,c,n,U,R);
    int res=ans.sum[k1][k2];
    if(k1==0)res=(res+comb.qpow(b/c,k2))%mod;//k1=0，0^0=1,答案记得加上
    cout<<res<<"\n";
}
```

}

### 求最简分数$\frac{a}{b} \lt \frac{p}{q} \lt \frac{c}{d}$

```cpp
// P5179
void work(int a,int b,int c,int d,int &p,int &q){
    if(a<b&&c>d){
        p=q=1;
        return;
    }
    work(d%c,c,b-(d/c)*a,a,q,p);
    q+=d/c*p;
}
void solve(){
    int a,b,c,d;
    while(cin>>a>>b>>c>>d){
        int p,q;
        work(a,b,c,d,p,q);
        cout<<p<<"/"<<q<<"\n";
    }
}
```

### 求$(n \mod 1) \oplus (n \mod 2)\oplus...\oplus(n \mod n)$

按位考虑一个数第$k$位为$1$，等价于$\lfloor \frac{x}{2^k} \rfloor -2\lfloor \frac{x}{2^{k+1}} \rfloor$

定义$ans_i$表示$\sum_{i=1}^n \lfloor \frac{n-i\lfloor \frac{n}{i} \rfloor}{2^k}\rfloor$

对于小于等于$\sqrt n$的数暴力做，这些块比较密集；大于的用整除分块+类欧

```cpp
void solve(){
    int n;
    cin>>n;
    int c=0;
    for(int i=1;i<=min(n,(int)1e6);i++)c^=n%i;
    vector<int> ans(50);
    for(int l=1e6+1,r;l<=n;l=r+1){
        int v=n/l;
        r=n/(n/l);
        for(int i=0;i<40;i++){
            ans[i]+=FloorSum(-v,n-l*v,1ll<<i,r-l);
        }
    }
    int res=0;
    for(int i=0;i<39;i++){
        res+=((ans[i]-2*ans[i+1])&1)*(1ll<<i);
    }
    cout<<(c^res)<<"\n";
}
```

## 拓展欧拉定理

$$
a^b \equiv
\begin{cases}
    a^{b \equiv \phi(m)},             & \begin{aligned}[l] &\gcd(a,m)=1 \end{aligned} \\
    a^b,                              & \begin{aligned}[l] &\gcd(a,m) \ne 1, \ b < \phi(m) \end{aligned} \\
    a^{(b \mod \phi(m))+\phi(m)},     & \begin{aligned}[l] &\gcd(a,m) \ne 1, \ b \geq \phi(m) \end{aligned}
\end{cases}
$$

## 莫比乌斯反演

### 莫比乌斯函数

* $n=p_1^{\alpha _1}p_2^{ \alpha _2}...p_k^{ \alpha _k}$
* $Mobius(i)=0, 任意的 \alpha>1$
* $Mobius(i)=1,\alpha=1且k为偶数$
* $Mobius(i)=-1, \alpha =1且k为奇数$
* $S(n)= \sum_{d|n} \mu (d),当n=1时,S(n)=1;当n>1,S(n)=0$

### 推导常用公式

1. 若 $F(n)= \sum_{d|n}f(d)$ ,则 $f(n)= \sum_{d|n} \mu (d) F(\frac{n}{d})$   ，这是莫比乌斯反演的正确公式，但是用这种方法很多时候特别难推，因此基本不会用到

2. $\sum_{d|n} \mu(d)= [n=1]$
3. $\sum_{i=1}^n \sum_{j=1}^m [\gcd(i,j)=d]= \sum_{i=1}^{\frac{n}{d} }\sum_{j=1}^{\frac{m}{d}} [\gcd(i,j)=1]$，2和3公式通常会一起使用
4. $\sum_{d|n} \phi(d)=n$
5. $\sum_{d|n} \mu(d)\frac{n}{d}=\phi(d)$

为了好写，推导默认下取整

### 求$\sum_{i=1}^n \sum_{j=1}^m [\gcd(i,j)=k]$

$$
\sum_{i=1}^n \sum_{j=1}^m [gcd(i,j)=k]= \sum_{i=1}^{\frac{n}{k} }\sum_{j=1}^{\frac{m}{k}} [gcd(i,j)=1]=\\
\sum_{i=1}^{\frac{n}{k}} \sum_{j=1}^{\frac{m}{k}}\sum_{d|\gcd(i,j)}\mu(d)=
\sum_{d=1}\mu(d)\sum_{i=1}^{\frac{n}{k}}[d|i]\sum_{j=1}^{\frac{m}{k}}[d|j]=\\
\sum_d^{min(\frac{n}{k},\frac{m}{k})} \mu(d)\frac{n}{kd}\frac{m}{kd}
$$

```cpp
int f(int a,int b,int k){
    int res=0;
    a=a/k,b=b/k;
    int n=min(a,b);
    for(int l=1,r;l<=n;l=r+1){
        r=min({n,a/(a/l),b/(b/l)});
        res+=(sum[r]-sum[l-1])*(a/l)*(b/l);//sum为mu前缀和
    }
    return res;
}
```



### 求$\sum_{i=1}^n \sum_{j=1}^m \gcd(i,j)$

$\sum_{k=1}^{\min(n,m)}\sum_d^{min(\frac{n}{k},\frac{m}{k})} \mu(d)\frac{n}{kd}\frac{m}{kd}$

令$T=kd$,$\sum_{T=1}^n \sum_{k|T}\mu(\frac{T}{k})\frac{n}{T}\frac{m}{T}$

$\sum_{k|T}\mu(\frac{T}{k})$可以调和级数预处理

```cpp
int mu[N],sum[N];
bool st[N];
vector<int> prime;
void sieve(int n){
    mu[1]=1;
    for(int i=2;i<=n;i++){
        if(!st[i]){
            st[i]=1;
            mu[i]=-1;
            prime.push_back(i);
        }
        for(auto p:prime){
            if(p*i>n)break;
            st[p*i]=1;
            if(i%p==0)break;
            mu[p*i]=-mu[i];
        }
    }
    for(auto p:prime){
        for(int i=p;i<=n;i+=p)sum[i]+=mu[i/p];
    }
    for(int i=1;i<=n;i++){
        sum[i]+=sum[i-1];
    }
}
int f(int a,int b){
    int res=0;
    int n=min(a,b);
    for(int l=1,r;l<=n;l=r+1){
        r=min({n,a/(a/l),b/(b/l)});
        res+=(sum[r]-sum[l-1])*(a/l)*(b/l);
    }
    return res;
}
void solve(){
    int a,b,k;
    cin>>a>>b;
    cout<<f(a,b)<<"\n";
}
```



### 求$\sum_{i=1}^n \sum_{j=1}^m lcm(i,j)$

$\sum_{i=1}^n \sum_{j=1}^m lcm(i,j)=\sum_{i=1}^n \sum_{j=1}^m \frac{ij}{gcd(i,j)}$

$=\sum_{i=1}^n \sum_{j=1}^m \sum_{d=1}^n ij\frac{[gcd(i,j)=d]}{d}=\sum_{d=1}^n \sum_{id=1}^{n} \sum_{jd=1}^{m} ijd^2\frac{[gcd(id,jd)=d]}{d}$

$=\sum_{d=1}^n \sum_{i=1}^{\frac{n}{d}} \sum_{j=1}^{\frac{m}{d}}ijd[gcd(i,j)=1]=\sum_{d=1}^n \sum_{i=1}^{\frac{n}{d}} \sum_{j=1}^{\frac{m}{d}}ijd \sum_{k|gcd(i,j)} \mu(k)$

$=\sum_{d=1}^n \sum_{i=1}^{\frac{n}{d}} \sum_{j=1}^{\frac{m}{d}}ijd \sum_{k=1}^{\frac{n}{d}} \mu(k)[k|i][k|j]$

$=\sum_{d=1}^nd \sum_{k=1}^{\frac{n}{d}} \mu(d) \sum_{ik=1}^{\frac{n}{d}}ik \sum_{jk=1}^{\frac{m}{d}}jk$

$=\sum_{d=1}^nd \sum_{k=1}^{\frac{n}{d}} \mu(k)k^2 \sum_{i=1}^{\frac{n}{kd}}i \sum_{j=1}^{\frac{m}{kd}}j$

定义 $F(n,m)= \sum_{k=1}^n \mu(k)k^2 \sum_{i=1}^{\frac{n}{k}}i\sum_{j=1}^{\frac{m}{k}}j$

$G(n,m)=\sum_{i=1}^n  \sum_{j=1}^m ij=\frac{n*(n+1)}{2}*\frac{m*(m+1)}{2}$

分块套分块解决，复杂度为 $O(n)$

```cpp
//P1829
int n,m;
int mu[N],sum[N];
bool vis[N];
vector<int> prime;
void sieve(){
	mu[1]=1;
	for(int i=2;i<N;i++){
		if(!vis[i]){
			vis[i]=1;
			prime.push_back(i);
			mu[i]=-1;
		}
		for(int j=0;j<prime.size()&&prime[j]*i<N;j++){
			vis[prime[j]*i]=1;
			if(i%prime[j]==0)break;
			mu[prime[j]*i]=-mu[i];
		}
	}
	for(int i=1;i<N;i++)sum[i]=(sum[i-1]+mu[i]*i%mod*i%mod)%mod,sum[i]=(sum[i]+mod)%mod;
}
int G(int n,int m){
	return n*(n+1)/2%mod*(m*(m+1)/2%mod)%mod;
}
int F(int n,int m){
	int res=0;
	for(int l=1,r;l<=n;l=r+1){
		r=min(n/(n/l),m/(m/l));
		res=(res+((sum[r]-sum[l-1])%mod+mod)%mod*G(n/l,m/l)%mod)%mod;
	}
	return res;
}
int cal(int n,int m){
	if(n>m)swap(n,m);
	int res=0;
	for(int l=1,r;l<=n;l=r+1){
		r=min(n/(n/l),m/(m/l));
		res=(res+(r-l+1)*(l+r)/2%mod*F(n/l,m/l)%mod)%mod;
	}
	return res;
}
void solve(){
	int n,m;
	cin>>n>>m;
	sieve();
	cout<<cal(n,m)<<"\n";
}  
```

### P3704 [SDOI2017] 数字表格

题意：

求 $\prod_{i=1}^n\prod_{j=1}^m f(\gcd(i,j)) ,f为斐波那契$

思路：

$\prod_{i=1}^n\prod_{j=1}^m\prod_{d=1}^nf(d)[\gcd(i,j)=d]$

$\prod_{d=1}^nf(d)^{\prod_{i=1}^n\prod_{j=1}^m[\gcd(i,j)=d]}=\prod_{d=1}^nf(d)^{\sum_{i=1}^{\frac{n}{d}}\sum_{j=1}^{\frac{m}{d}}[\gcd(i,j)=1]}$

$\sum_{i=1}^{\frac{n}{d}}\sum_{j=1}^{\frac{m}{d}}[\gcd(i,j)=1]=\sum_{k=1}^{\frac{n}{d}} \mu(k)\sum_{i=1}^{\frac{n}{d}}[k|i]\sum_{i=1}^{\frac{m}{d}}[k|j]$

$=\sum_{k=1}^{\frac{n}{d}} \mu(k)\lfloor \frac{n}{dk} \rfloor \lfloor \frac{m}{dk} \rfloor$

$令T=dk,k=\frac{T}{d},=\sum_{T=1}^n \mu(\frac{T}{d})\frac{n}{T}\frac{m}{T}$

$原式=\prod_{T=1}^n(\prod_{d=1}^nf(d)^{\mu(\frac{T}{d})})^{\frac{n}{T}\frac{m}{T}}$

$令F(j)=\prod_{i=1}^nf(i)^{\mu(\frac{j}{i})},需要预处理f(j)，然后每个测试样例O(\sqrt n)算$

```cpp
bool vis[N];
int mu[N],F[N],f[N],invf[N];
vector<int> prime;
int qpow(int a,int b){
	int ans=1;
	for(;b;b>>=1){
		if(b&1)ans=ans*a%mod;
		a=a*a%mod;
	}
	return ans;
}
void init(){
	mu[1]=1;
	f[1]=F[0]=F[1]=invf[0]=invf[1]=1;
	for(int i=2;i<N;i++){
		if(!vis[i]){
			prime.push_back(i);
			mu[i]=-1;
		}
		for(int j=0;j<prime.size()&&i*prime[j]<N;j++){
			vis[i*prime[j]]=1;
			if(i%prime[j]==0)break;
			mu[i*prime[j]]=-mu[i];
		}
		f[i]=(f[i-1]+f[i-2])%mod;
		invf[i]=qpow(f[i],mod-2);
		F[i]=1;	
	}
	for(int i=1;i<N;i++){
		for(int j=i;j<N;j+=i){
			if(mu[j/i])F[j]=(F[j]*(mu[j/i]==1?f[i]:invf[i]))%mod;
		}
	}
	for(int i=2;i<N;i++)F[i]=F[i]*F[i-1]%mod;
}
int cal(int n,int m){
	if(n>m)swap(n,m);
	int ans=1;
	for(int l=1,r;l<=n;l=r+1){
		r=min(n/(n/l),m/(m/l));
		int s=F[r]*qpow(F[l-1],mod-2)%mod; 
		ans=ans*qpow(s,(n/l)*(m/l))%mod;
	}
	return ans;
}
void solve(){
	int n,m;
	cin>>n>>m;
	cout<<cal(n,m)<<"\n";
}   
```

### P3327 [SDOI2015] 约数个数和

题意：

$d(x)是x的约数个数，\sum_{i=1}^n \sum_{j=1}^md(ij)$

思路：

$d(ij)=\sum_{x|i}\sum_{y|i}[\gcd(x,y)=1]=\sum_{x|i}\sum_{y|i}\sum_{p|\gcd(x,y)} \mu(p)$

$=\sum_{p=1}^{min(i,j)}\sum_{x|i}\sum_{y|i}[p|\gcd(x,y)]\mu(p)$

$=\sum_{p|i,p|j}\mu(p)\sum_{x|i}\sum_{y|j}[p|\gcd(x,y)]=\sum_{p|i,p|j}\mu(p)\sum_{x|\frac{i}{p}}\sum_{y|\frac{j}{p}}1=\sum_{p|i,p|j}\mu(p)d(\frac{i}{p})d(\frac{j}{p})$

带入原式得，$\sum_{i=1}^n\sum_{j=1}^m\sum_{p|i,p|j}\mu(p)d(\frac{i}{p})d(\frac{j}{p})=\sum_{p=1}^{min(n,m)}\sum_{i=1}^{\frac{n}{p}}\sum_{j=1}^{\frac{m}{p}}\mu(p)d(i)d(j)$

```cpp
bool vis[N];
int mu[N],d[N],t[N];//t为最小质因子出现次数
vector<int> prime;
void init(){
	mu[1]=d[1]=1;
	for(int i=2;i<N;i++){
		if(!vis[i]){
			vis[i]=1;
			prime.push_back(i);
			mu[i]=-1;
			d[i]=2;
			t[i]=1;
		}
		for(int j=0;j<prime.size()&&i*prime[j]<N;j++){
			vis[i*prime[j]]=1;
			if(i%prime[j]==0){
				d[i*prime[j]]=d[i]/(t[i]+1)*(t[i]+2);
				t[i*prime[j]]=t[i]+1;
				break;
			}
			mu[i*prime[j]]=-mu[i];
			d[i*prime[j]]=d[i]*2;
			t[i*prime[j]]=1;
		}
	}
	for(int i=2;i<N;i++){
		d[i]+=d[i-1],mu[i]+=mu[i-1];
	}
}
int cal(int n,int m){
	if(n>m)swap(n,m);
	int ans=0;
	for(int l=1,r;l<=n;l=r+1){
		r=min(n/(n/l),m/(m/l));
		ans+=(mu[r]-mu[l-1])*d[n/l]*d[m/l];
	}
	return ans;
}
void solve(){
	int n,m;
	cin>>n>>m;
	cout<<cal(n,m)<<"\n";
}   
```

### 求$\sum_{i=1}^n \sum_{j=1}^n ij\gcd(i,j)$

$$
\sum_{k=1}^n k^3 \sum_{i=1}^{\frac{n}{k}}\sum_{j=1}^{\frac{n}{k}} ij[gcd(i,j)=1]=\\
\sum_{k=1}^n k^3 \sum_{i=1}^{\frac{n}{k}}\sum_{j=1}^{\frac{n}{k}} \sum_{d|\gcd(i,j)}\mu(d)ij=\\
\sum_{k=1}^n k^3 \sum_{d=1}^{\frac{n}{k}}\mu(d)d^2\sum_{i=1}^{\frac{n}{kd}}\sum_{j=1}^{\frac{n}{kd}}ij=\\
令g(x)=(\frac{n(n+1)}{2})^2,T=kd\\
\sum_{T=1}^ng(\frac{n}{T})T^2\sum_{k|T}\mu(\frac{T}{k})k=\sum_{T=1}^ng(\frac{n}{T})T^2\phi(T)
$$

如果$n \geq 1e9$,如P3768,函数$f(x)=x^2\phi(x)$用杜教筛求解

```cpp
vector<int> phi,sum_phi;
vector<int> prime;
vector<bool> st;
int P,inv2,inv6;
int qpow(int a,int b,int mod){
    int ans=1;
    for(;b;b>>=1){
        if(b&1)ans=ans*a%mod;
        a=a*a%mod;
    }
    return ans;
}
void sieve(int n){
    phi.resize(n+1);
    sum_phi.resize(n+1);
    st.resize(n+1);
    phi[1]=1;
    for(int i=2;i<=n;i++){
        if(!st[i]){
            prime.push_back(i);
            phi[i]=i-1;
        }
        for(auto p:prime){
            if(p*i>n)break;
            st[p*i]=1;
            if(i%p==0){
                phi[p*i]=phi[i]*p;
                break;
            }
            else{
                phi[p*i]=phi[i]*(p-1);
            }
        }
    }
    for(int i=1;i<=n;i++){
        sum_phi[i]=(sum_phi[i-1]+phi[i]*i%P*i%P)%P;
    }
}
unordered_map<int,int> mp;
int G(int x){
    x%=P;
    return x*(x+1)%P*(2*x+1)%P*inv6%P;
}
int g(int x){
    x%=P;
    return x*(x+1)%P*inv2%P*x%P*(x+1)%P*inv2%P;
}
int S(int x){
    if(x<sum_phi.size())return sum_phi[x];
    if(mp.count(x))return mp[x];
    int res=g(x);
    int pre=1,cur;
    for(int l=2,r;l<=x;l=r+1){
        r=x/(x/l);
        cur=G(r);
        res-=(cur-pre+P)%P*S(x/l)%P;
        res=(res%P+P)%P;
        pre=cur;
    }
    return mp[x]=(res%P+P)%P;
}
int f(int n){
    int res=0;
    int pre=0,cur;
    for(int l=1,r;l<=n;l=r+1){
        r=n/(n/l);
        int cur=S(r);
        res=(res+g(n/l)*(cur-pre+P)%P)%P;
        pre=cur;
    }
    return (res%P+P)%P;
}
void solve(){
    int n;
    cin>>P>>n; 
    inv2=qpow(2,P-2,P);
    inv6=qpow(6,P-2,P);
    sieve(pow(n,2.0/3));  
    cout<<f(n)<<"\n";
}
```

### 求$\sum_{i=1}^n\sum_{j=i+1}^n lcm(a_i,a_j)$

利用一个桶记录出现个数，$t_i$表示$i$的出现个数

$\sum_{i=1}^n\sum_{j=i+1}^n lcm(a_i,a_j)=\frac{\sum_{i=1}^n\sum_{j=1}^n lcm(a_i,a_j)-\sum_{i=1}^n a_i}{2}$

$\sum_{i=1}^n\sum_{j=1}^n lcm(a_i,a_j)=\sum_{i=1}^{Max}\sum_{j=1}^{Max}lcm(i,j)\cdot t_i \cdot t_j$

反演得到$\sum_{T=1}^{n} T(\sum_{i=1}^{\frac{n}{T}}i \times t_{iT})^2 \sum_{k|T}\mu(k)k$

详见P3911和agc038c

```cpp
// 求\sum_{i=1}^n\sum_{j=1}^n lcm(a[i],a[j])
int mu[N],sum[N],t[N],sum_t[N];
bool st[N];
vector<int> prime;
void sieve(int n){
    mu[1]=1;
    for(int i=2;i<=n;i++){
        if(!st[i]){
            prime.push_back(i);
            mu[i]=-1;
        }
        for(auto x:prime){
            if(x*i>n)break;
            st[x*i]=1;
            if(i%x==0){
                mu[x*i]=0;
                break;
            }
            else mu[x*i]=-mu[i];
        }
    }
    for(int i=1;i<=n;i++){
        for(int j=i;j<=n;j+=i){
            sum[j]+=mu[i]*i;
        }
    }
}
void solve(){
    int n;
    cin>>n;
    for(int i=1;i<=n;i++){
        int x;
        cin>>x;
        t[x]++;
    }
    sieve(1e6);
    int ans=0;
    for(int T=1;T<=1e6;T++){
        int res=0;
        for(int i=1;i<=1e6/T;i++)res+=i*t[i*T];
        ans+=T*res*res*sum[T];
    }
    cout<<ans<<"\n";
}
```



## 杜教筛

在$n^{\frac{2}{3}}$的时间内求解$S(n)=\sum_{i=1}^nf(i)$

构造一个函数g使得：

1. 可以快速计算$\sum_{i=1}^n(f*g)(i)$
2. 可以快速计算g的前缀和，可以用数论分块快速计算$\sum_{i=2}^ng(i)S(\lfloor \frac{n}{i} \rfloor)$

递推式：

$g(1)S(n)=\sum_{i=1}^n(f*g)(i)-\sum_{i=2}^ng(i)S(\lfloor \frac{n}{i} \rfloor)$

### 求莫比乌斯函数前缀和和欧拉函数前缀和

莫比乌斯函数：

$\epsilon=[n=1],\epsilon=\mu * 1$

$S(n)=1-\sum_{i=2}^n S(\lfloor \frac{n}{i} \rfloor)$

欧拉函数：

$id(x)=x,\phi *1=id$

$S(n)=\frac{n(n+1)}{2}-\sum_{i=2}^nS(\lfloor \frac{n}{i} \rfloor)$

```cpp
vector<int> mu,sum_mu,phi,sum_phi;
vector<int> prime;
vector<bool> st;
void sieve(int n){
    mu.resize(n+1);
    sum_mu.resize(n+1);
    phi.resize(n+1);
    sum_phi.resize(n+1);
    st.resize(n+1);
    mu[1]=1;
    phi[1]=1;
    for(int i=2;i<=n;i++){
        if(!st[i]){
            prime.push_back(i);
            mu[i]=-1;
            phi[i]=i-1;
        }
        for(auto p:prime){
            if(p*i>n)break;
            st[p*i]=1;
            if(i%p==0){
                mu[p*i]=0;
                phi[p*i]=phi[i]*p;
                break;
            }
            else{
                mu[p*i]=-mu[i];
                phi[p*i]=phi[i]*(p-1);
            }
        }
    }
    for(int i=1;i<=n;i++){
        sum_mu[i]=sum_mu[i-1]+mu[i];
        sum_phi[i]=sum_phi[i-1]+phi[i];
    }
}
unordered_map<int,int> mp_mu,mp_phi;
int S_mu(int x){
    if(x<mu.size())return sum_mu[x];
    if(mp_mu.count(x))return mp_mu[x];
    int res=1;
    for(int l=2,r;l<=x;l=r+1){
        r=x/(x/l);
        res-=S_mu(x/l)*(r-l+1);
    }
    return mp_mu[x]=res;
}
int S_phi(int x){
    if(x<phi.size())return sum_phi[x];
    if(mp_phi.count(x))return mp_phi[x];
    int res=x*(x+1)/2;
    for(int l=2,r;l<=x;l=r+1){
        r=x/(x/l);
        res-=S_phi(x/l)*(r-l+1);
    }
    return mp_phi[x]=res;
}
void solve(){
    int n;
    cin>>n;
    cout<<S_phi(n)<<" "<<S_mu(n)<<"\n";
}
```

### $f(i)=i^2\phi(i)$

$f=id^2\phi$，构造$g=id^2$

$(f*g)(i)=\sum_{d|i}f(d)g(\frac{i}{d})=\sum_{d|i}d^2\phi(d)\frac{i^2}{d^2}=i^2 \sum_{d|i}\phi(d)=i^3$

$S(n)=(\frac{n(n+1)}{2})^2-\sum_{i=2}^n i^2S(\lfloor \frac{n}{i} \rfloor)$

## LUCAS定理

预处理复杂度$O(p)$,单次询问复杂度$O(\log _pn)$,$p$必须为素数

```cpp
class BinomModPrime {
  int p;
  std::vector<int> fa, ifa;

  // Calculate binom(n, k) mod p for n, k < p.
  int calc(int n, int k) {
    if (n < k) return 0;
    long long res = fa[n];
    res = (res * ifa[k]) % p;
    res = (res * ifa[n - k]) % p;
    return res;
  }

 public:
  BinomModPrime(int p) : p(p), fa(p), ifa(p) {
    // Factorials mod p till p.
    fa[0] = 1;
    for (int i = 1; i < p; ++i) {
      fa[i] = (long long)fa[i - 1] * i % p;
    }
    // Inverse of factorials mod p till p.
    ifa[p - 1] = p - 1;  // Wilson's theorem.
    for (int i = p - 1; i; --i) {
      ifa[i - 1] = (long long)ifa[i] * i % p;
    }
  }

  // Calculate binom(n, k) mod p.
  int binomial(long long n, long long k) {
    long long res = 1;
    while (n || k) {
      res = (res * calc(n % p, k % p)) % p;
      n /= p;
      k /= p;
    }
    return res;
  }
};
```

### 拓展LUCAS定理(p为任意数)

```cpp
// Extended Euclid.
void ex_gcd(int a, int b, int& x, int& y) {
  if (!b) {
    x = 1;
    y = 0;
  } else {
    ex_gcd(b, a % b, y, x);
    y -= a / b * x;
  }
}

// Inverse of a mod m.
int inverse(int a, int m) {
  int x, y;
  ex_gcd(a, m, x, y);
  return (x % m + m) % m;
}

// Coefficient in CRT.
int crt_coeff(int m_i, int m) {
  long long mm = m / m_i;
  mm *= inverse(mm, m_i);
  return mm % m;
}

// Binominal Coefficient Calculator Modulo Prime Power.
class BinomModPrimePower {
  int p, a, pa;
  std::vector<int> f;

  // Obtain multiplicity of p in n!.
  long long nu(long long n) {
    long long count = 0;
    do {
      n /= p;
      count += n;
    } while (n);
    return count;
  }

  // Calculate (n!)_p mod pa.
  long long fact_mod(long long n) {
    bool neg = p != 2 || pa <= 4;
    long long res = 1;
    while (n > 1) {
      if ((n / pa) & neg) res = pa - res;
      res = res * f[n % pa] % pa;
      n /= p;
    }
    return res;
  }

 public:
  BinomModPrimePower(int p, int a, int pa) : p(p), a(a), pa(pa), f(pa) {
    // Pretreatment.
    f[0] = 1;
    for (int i = 1; i < pa; ++i) {
      f[i] = i % p ? (long long)f[i - 1] * i % pa : f[i - 1];
    }
  }

  // Calculate Binom(n, k) mod pa.
  int binomial(long long n, long long k) {
    long long v = nu(n) - nu(n - k) - nu(k);
    if (v >= a) return 0;
    auto res = fact_mod(n - k) * fact_mod(k) % pa;
    res = fact_mod(n) * inverse(res, pa) % pa;
    for (; v; --v) res *= p;
    return res % pa;
  }
};

// Binominal Coefficient Calculator.
class BinomMod {
  int m;
  std::vector<BinomModPrimePower> bp;
  std::vector<long long> crt_m;

 public:
  BinomMod(int n) : m(n) {
    // Factorize.
    for (int p = 2; p * p <= n; ++p) {
      if (n % p == 0) {
        int a = 0, pa = 1;
        for (; n % p == 0; n /= p, ++a, pa *= p);
        bp.emplace_back(p, a, pa);
        crt_m.emplace_back(crt_coeff(pa, m));
      }
    }
    if (n > 1) {
      bp.emplace_back(n, 1, n);
      crt_m.emplace_back(crt_coeff(n, m));
    }
  }

  // Calculate Binom(n, k) mod m.
  int binomial(long long n, long long k) {
    long long res = 0;
    for (size_t i = 0; i != bp.size(); ++i) {
      res = (bp[i].binomial(n, k) * crt_m[i] + res) % m;
    }
    return res;
  }
};
```

## 离散对数

### 找到$x^a \equiv b(\mod p)$的所有$x$解

```cpp
int gcd(int a, int b) { return a ? gcd(b % a, a) : b; }

int powmod(int a, int b, int p) {
  int res = 1;
  while (b > 0) {
    if (b & 1) res = res * a % p;
    a = a * a % p, b >>= 1;
  }
  return res;
}

// Finds the primitive root modulo p
int generator(int p) {
  vector<int> fact;
  int phi = p - 1, n = phi;
  for (int i = 2; i * i <= n; ++i) {
    if (n % i == 0) {
      fact.push_back(i);
      while (n % i == 0) n /= i;
    }
  }
  if (n > 1) fact.push_back(n);
  for (int res = 2; res <= p; ++res) {
    bool ok = true;
    for (int factor : fact) {
      if (powmod(res, phi / factor, p) == 1) {
        ok = false;
        break;
      }
    }
    if (ok) return res;
  }
  return -1;
}

// This program finds all numbers x such that x^k=a (mod n)
int main() {
  int n, k, a;
  scanf("%d %d %d", &n, &k, &a);
  if (a == 0) return puts("1\n0"), 0;
  int g = generator(n);
  // Baby-step giant-step discrete logarithm algorithm
  int sq = (int)sqrt(n + .0) + 1;
  vector<pair<int, int>> dec(sq);
  for (int i = 1; i <= sq; ++i)
    dec[i - 1] = {powmod(g, i * sq * k % (n - 1), n), i};
  sort(dec.begin(), dec.end());
  int any_ans = -1;
  for (int i = 0; i < sq; ++i) {
    int my = powmod(g, i * k % (n - 1), n) * a % n;
    auto it = lower_bound(dec.begin(), dec.end(), make_pair(my, 0));
    if (it != dec.end() && it->first == my) {
      any_ans = it->second * sq - i;
      break;
    }
  }
  if (any_ans == -1) return puts("0"), 0;
  // Print all possible answers
  int delta = (n - 1) / gcd(k, n - 1);
  vector<int> ans;
  for (int cur = any_ans % delta; cur < n - 1; cur += delta)
    ans.push_back(powmod(g, cur, n));
  sort(ans.begin(), ans.end());
  printf("%zu\n", ans.size());
  for (int answer : ans) printf("%d ", answer);
}
```

## Stern–Brocot 树与 Farey 序列



![image-20250524205015390](C:\Users\Winner\AppData\Roaming\Typora\typora-user-images\image-20250524205015390.png)

每一次迭代在$\frac{a}{b},\frac{c}{d}$之间插入$\frac{a+c}{b+d}$

### 性质

单调性：每一层的数单调增

最简性：每个分数都是最简的

完全性：包含了所有最简分数

### 求最接近一个实数的分数
